dependency_rules.description: Employer match formula is required when contribution type includes employer or safe harbor contribution.

messages.employerMatchFormula: Employer Match Formula is required when Contribution Type includes employer matching contribution.

dependency_rules.description: Default automatic enrollment percentage is required when automatic enrollment type is not None.

messages.defaultAutomaticEnrollmentPercentage: Default Automatic Enrollment Percentage is required when Automatic Enrollment Type is selected.

dependency_rules.description: Automatic annual increase is applicable only when automatic enrollment is enabled.
Custom vesting details are required when vesting schedule is Custom Schedule.

messages.customVestingScheduleDetails: Custom Vesting Schedule Details are required when Vesting Schedule is Custom Schedule.

dependency_rules.description: Custom eligibility details are required when eligibility requirement is Custom Eligibility.

messages.customEligibilityRequirementDetails: Custom Eligibility Requirement Details are required when Eligibility Requirement is Custom Eligibility.

dependency_rules.description: Loan-related fields are required when loans are permitted.

messages.maximumLoanAmount: Maximum Loan Amount is required when Loan Permitted is Yes.
messages.loanRepaymentPeriod: Loan Repayment Period is required when Loan Permitted is Yes.

dependency_rules.description: Employer Non-Elective Contribution dependent fields are hidden and cleared when Employer Non-Elective Contribution is not permitted.
Other text is required only when Employer Non-Elective Contribution Type is Other.
Other allocation method text is required only when Employer Non-Elective Contribution Allocation Method is Other.
Employer Non-Elective Contribution allocation condition fields are hidden and cleared when allocation conditions are not allowed.
Hours required is required only when Hours Requirement is selected.
Other allocation condition text is required only when Other allocation condition is selected.
Employer Match Contribution dependent fields are hidden and cleared when Employer Match Contribution is not permitted.
Other text is required only when Employer Match Contribution Type is Other.
Student loan effective date is required only when student loan match is allowed.
Employer Match Contribution allocation condition fields are hidden and cleared when allocation conditions are not allowed.
Hours required is required only when Hours Requirement is selected.
Other allocation condition text is required only when Other allocation condition is selected.
Safe Harbor dependent fields are hidden and cleared when Safe Harbor Contribution is not permitted.
Other vesting schedule text is required only when Safe Harbor Vesting Schedule is Other.
Automatic enrollment fields are hidden and cleared when Automatic Enrollment Type is None.
Annual increase percent and maximum percent are required only when automatic annual increase is allowed.
Withdrawal window days is required only for EACA or QACA automatic enrollment.
Loan dependent fields are hidden and cleared when Loans - Number is None.
Other loan restriction text is required only when Other loan restriction is selected.

rules.message: Employer EIN must be in ##-####### format.
Plan Number must be 3 digits.
Plan Effective Date must be in MM/DD/YYYY format.
Employee Contribution Percentage cannot be less than 0%.
Employee Contribution Percentage cannot be greater than 100%.
Default Automatic Enrollment Percentage cannot be less than 0%.
Default Automatic Enrollment Percentage cannot be greater than 100%.
Employer Non-Elective Contribution Type - Other cannot exceed 500 characters.
Employer Non-Elective Contribution Formula cannot exceed 1000 characters.
Employer Non-Elective Contribution Allocation Method - Other cannot exceed 500 characters.
Employer Non-Elective Contribution Hours Required must be greater than 0.
Employer Non-Elective Contribution Hours Required cannot be greater than 1000.
Employer Non-Elective Contribution Allocation Condition - Other cannot exceed 500 characters.
Employer Non-Elective Contribution Default Exceptions cannot include None with other exceptions.
Employer Match Contribution Type - Other cannot exceed 500 characters.
Employer Match Contribution Formula cannot exceed 1000 characters.
Employer Match Contribution Maximum Deferral Percent cannot be less than 0%.
Employer Match Contribution Maximum Deferral Percent cannot be greater than 100%.
Employer Match Contribution Student Loan Effective Date must be in MM/DD/YYYY format.
Employer Match Contribution Hours Required must be greater than 0.
Employer Match Contribution Hours Required cannot be greater than 1000.
Employer Match Contribution Allocation Condition - Other cannot exceed 500 characters.
Employer Match Contribution Default Exceptions cannot include None with other exceptions.
Safe Harbor Vesting Schedule - Other cannot exceed 500 characters.
Automatic Enrollment Default Percent cannot be less than 0%.
Automatic Enrollment Default Percent cannot be greater than 100%.
Automatic Enrollment Annual Increase Percent cannot be less than 0%.
Automatic Enrollment Annual Increase Percent cannot be greater than 100%.
Automatic Enrollment Maximum Percent cannot be less than 0%.
Automatic Enrollment Maximum Percent cannot be greater than 100%.
Automatic Enrollment Maximum Percent must be greater than or equal to Automatic Enrollment Default Percent.
Automatic Enrollment Withdrawal Window Days must be greater than 0.
Automatic Enrollment Withdrawal Window Days cannot be greater than 90.
Loans - Restrictions cannot include Hardship Loans Only with general loan restriction options.
Loans - Restrictions - Other cannot exceed 500 characters.
Loans - Minimum must be a valid currency amount.
Loans - Minimum cannot be less than 0.
Loans - Maximum must be a valid currency amount.
Loans - Maximum cannot be less than 0.
Loans - Maximum must be greater than or equal to Loans - Minimum.
Loans - Rate cannot exceed 250 characters.
Loans - Repayment Period Years must be greater than 0.
Loans - Repayment Period Years cannot be greater than 30.
